channel.title: GitHub MDX Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of MDX in GitHub

item.title: e2b-dev/E2B
item.description: Open-source, secure environment with real-world tools for enterprise-grade agents.

item.title: yangshun/front-end-interview-handbook
item.description: 🌐 Front End interview preparation materials for busy engineers (updated for 2025)

item.title: worldcoin/world-id-docs
item.description: Developer documentation for the Worldcoin SDK and World ID.

item.title: tauri-apps/tauri-docs
item.description: The source for all Tauri project documentation.

item.title: e2b-dev/code-interpreter
item.description: Python & JS/TS SDK for running AI-generated code/code interpreting in your AI app

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules
item.description: 📄 Configuration files that enhance Cursor AI editor experience with custom rules and behaviors

item.title: twbs/bootstrap
item.description: The most popular HTML, CSS, and JavaScript framework for developing responsive, mobile first projects on the web.

item.title: newrelic/docs-website
item.description: Source code for @newrelic docs. We welcome pull requests and questions on our docs!

item.title: mintlify/starter
item.description: 📖 The starter kit for your Mintlify docs

item.title: ClickHouse/clickhouse-docs
item.description: Official documentation for ClickHouse - the fastest and most resource efficient real-time data warehouse and open-source database.

item.title: jellyfin/jellyfin.org
item.description: Jellyfin Project website, blog, and user documentation
